prestazioni: CTS Turbo Stage 2+ Hybrid Turbo Upgrade for the CTWA 3.0L V6 TFSI (354hp stock) featuring a billet compressor wheel, 62mm inducer, and 76mm exducer with a custom wastegate actuator for 550whp on E85 with supporting mods
034 Motorsport High-Flow Fuel Pump Upgrade (350 LPH) paired with a Bosch Motorsport 0261500360 1000cc/min port-injection kit to eliminate fuel starvation under high boost on the CTWA engine

APR Stage 3+ ECU/TCU Software with custom ethanol mapping for the CTWA, including optimized ignition timing, boost targets (28psi peak), and torque vectoring adjustments for the ZF 8HP70 transmission with a reinforced torque converter
estetica: Rocket Bunny SQ5 Widebody Kit (Type 2) with extended carbon fiber fenders, custom front splitter, and rear diffuser for aggressive stance and improved aerodynamics, paired with a 30mm front and 20mm rear adjustable wheel spacer setup

OEM+ Audi Sport Carbon Fiber Side Skirts and Rear Spoiler (8W0 853 661/662) with a custom matte clear coat for a stealth OEM+ look, combined with a Vorsteiner V-FF107 21x10.5 ET35 forged wheel setup in Gloss Black with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30/21)

APR Carbon Fiber Engine Cover with integrated cold air intake system (replacing the stock airbox) and a custom CNC-machined aluminum oil cap (Mishimoto MMOC-AUD-17) for a high-end engine bay aesthetic
